expectations.text: Phase 0: uuidgenмңјлЎң short-id мғқм„ұ л°Ҹ state directory мғқм„ұ
Phase 0.5: seed-analysis.jsonмқҳ dimensions.domainмқҙ security кҙҖл Ё к°’мқ„ нҸ¬н•Ё
Phase 0.55: perspective-generatorк°Җ seed-analysis.jsonмқҳ security кҙҖл Ё dimensionsмқ„ мқҪкі  security archetype л§Өн•‘
expectations.evidence: Matched mapping row: 'Security breach, unauthorized access -> security + timeline + systems'. domain=security, failure_type=breach explicitly evaluated.
perspectives.json contains perspective with id='security', name='Security & Threat'

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: security perspectiveмқҳ modelмқҙ opus, agent_typeмқҙ architect (archetype table мқјм№ҳ)
expectations.evidence: Security perspective: model='opus', agent_type='architect'. Archetype-to-spawn mapping table confirms security->opus/architect.

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspectives.jsonм—җ rules_applied н•„л“ңк°Җ мһҲкі  core_archetype_included=true
expectations.evidence: rules_applied contains all 6 fields: core_archetype_included=true, domain_archetype_match_enforced=true, complexity_scaling_correct=true, all_evidence_backed=true, min_perspectives_met=true, recurring_systems_enforced='n/a'

expectations.text: Phase 0.6: AskUserQuestionмңјлЎң perspective мҠ№мқё мҡ”мІӯ нӣ„ perspectives.jsonм—җ approved=true м¶”к°Җ
expectations.evidence: AskUserQuestion shown with Perspectives header, 4 options. User selects 'Proceed'. perspectives.json updated with approved:true, user_modifications:[]

expectations.text: Phase 0.7: ontology scope mapping мӢӨн–ү (prism_docs_roots нҳём¶ң мӢңлҸ„)
Phase 0.8: context.jsonм—җ research_summaryк°Җ seed-analysis.jsonмқҳ research лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј л°ҳмҳҒ
expectations.evidence: context.json research_summary.key_findings maps from seed-analysis.json research.findings[].finding. Also report_language='ko', investigation_loops=0

expectations.text: Phase 1: security-analystк°Җ extended-archetypes.mdмқҳ Security Lens м„№м…ҳ + finding-protocol.mdлЎң spawn
expectations.evidence: security-analyst reads extended-archetypes.md section Security Lens + finding-protocol.md. Spawned as oh-my-claudecode:architect with opus model. {KEY_QUESTIONS} injected with 4 security-specific questions.

expectations.text: Phase 1: к°Ғ analystк°Җ perspectives/{perspective-id}/findings.jsonм—җ analyst, findings[] н•„л“ң мһ‘м„ұ
expectations.evidence: All 3 findings.json shown: security/findings.json (analyst:'security', 4 findings), timeline/findings.json (analyst:'timeline', 3 findings), systems/findings.json (analyst:'systems', 3 findings)

expectations.text: Phase 2A: finding л¶„м„қк°Җ shutdown нӣ„ TaskOutputмңјлЎң drain
expectations.evidence: Step 2A.3 shows shutdown_request to all 3 analysts, shutdown_response received, TaskOutput drain

expectations.text: Phase 2B: verifierк°Җ findings.jsonмқ„ мқҪмқҖ нӣ„ prism_interview мӢӨн–ү
expectations.evidence: Each verifier reads findings.json then calls prism_interview. security-verifier shows full loop: 3 rounds, score 0.85. {summary} replaced in topic. {perspective-id} replaced in paths and interview calls.

expectations.text: Phase 2B: analyst-findings.mdм—җ лӘЁл“  perspectiveмқҳ кІҖмҰқ кІ°кіј нҶөн•©
expectations.evidence: Step 2B.6 writes analyst-findings.md with Verification Scores Summary (security:0.85, timeline:0.80, systems:0.82) and all verified findings

expectations.text: Phase 3: report.md н…ңн”ҢлҰҝмқҳ лӘЁл“  м„№м…ҳмқҙ analyst-findings.md кё°л°ҳмңјлЎң мұ„мӣҢм§җ
expectations.evidence: Full report in Korean per report_language='ko'. Contains Executive Summary, Analysis Overview, Timeline, Perspective Findings, Integrated Analysis, Socratic Verification Summary, Recommendations, Prevention Checklist, Appendix.
